Headline: #28 Stony Island Temporary Northbound Reroute near 73rd/Stony Island
ShortDescription: Northbound 28 Stony Island buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 73rd/Stony Island.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #28 Stony Island buses are temporarily rerouted via Stony island, 79th, Jeffery, 67th and Stony Island: due to,  street blockage near 73rd/Stony Island.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
